product_overview: A React + Vite web application to manage SomBoon Electric's inventory, record sales, view reports and configure preferences (including dark mode). The app provides a dashboard with key metrics and page navigation while preparing for API integrations and authentication.
core_goals: Provide a dashboard with real-time key metrics (sales, inventory, low-stock alerts).
Allow full inventory CRUD: view, add, edit, delete products with accurate stock counts.
Record and track sales transactions and reflect stock changes immediately.
Generate downloadable sales and inventory reports for date ranges and exports.
Expose user settings (theme toggle, preferences) with persisted server-side state.
Design clear API contracts to replace current static data and enable future authentication.

features.name: Dashboard
features.description: Shows high-level KPIs (total sales, inventory value, low-stock counts) and recent activity to help staff quickly assess shop status and navigate to detailed pages.
user_flows: GET /api/dashboard/metrics -> Receive 200 with {totalSales, salesToday, inventoryValue, lowStockCount} -> GET /api/dashboard/recent-activities -> Receive 200 with list of recent transactions and alerts
GET /api/dashboard/metrics -> Receive 500 with error 'database unavailable' (server error) -> GET /api/dashboard/recent-activities -> Receive 503 with error 'service temporarily unavailable'

features.name: Inventory Management
features.description: View and manage product stock: list items, add new products, edit product details and delete items. Inventory endpoints are the canonical source of truth (replaces static data).
user_flows: GET /api/inventory -> Receive 200 with array of inventory items -> POST /api/inventory with {sku, name, quantity, price} -> Receive 201 with created item -> GET /api/inventory/{id} -> Receive 200 with created item
POST /api/inventory with missing 'name' field -> Receive 400 with validation error 'name is required' -> DELETE /api/inventory/{nonexistentId} -> Receive 404 with 'item not found'

features.name: Sales Recording & Tracking
features.description: Record sales transactions, decrement stock accordingly, and allow retrieval of sale records for auditing and reporting.
user_flows: POST /api/sales with {items:[{productId,quantity}], payment:{method,amount}} -> Receive 201 with {saleId, timestamp, total} -> GET /api/sales/{saleId} -> Receive 200 with full sale details -> GET /api/inventory/{productId} -> Receive 200 with updated stock
POST /api/sales with quantity greater than available stock -> Receive 409 with error 'Insufficient stock' -> GET /api/sales/{pendingId} -> Receive 404 with 'sale not found' (failed transaction)

features.name: Reports (Sales & Inventory)
features.description: Generate aggregate sales and inventory reports for arbitrary date ranges, and provide downloadable exports (CSV/Excel).
user_flows: GET /api/reports/sales?start=2026-02-01&end=2026-02-21 -> Receive 200 with aggregated metrics and CSV download token -> GET /api/reports/sales/download/{fileId} -> Receive 200 with CSV file stream

GET /api/reports/sales?start=2026-02-30&end=2026-02-21 -> Receive 400 with validation error 'invalid date range' -> GET /api/reports/inventory?asOf=2026-02-21 -> Receive 422 with error 'report generation failed due to invalid parameters'

features.name: Settings
features.description: Manage application preferences such as theme (dark/light) and locale; settings are persisted server-side so UI state remains consistent across devices.
user_flows: GET /api/settings -> Receive 200 with {theme:'light', currency:'THB', notifications:true} -> PATCH /api/settings with {theme:'dark'} -> Receive 200 with updated settings {theme:'dark'}
PATCH /api/settings with invalid theme 'ultraviolet' -> Receive 400 with validation error 'Invalid theme value' -> GET /api/settings -> Receive 401 Unauthorized (if authentication added later)

features.name: Dashboard Page
features.description: Displays key metrics and navigation to other pages
